---
description: "Accessibility requirements for markdown and docs updates in this repository"
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---
# Markdown Accessibility Rules

When editing markdown in this repository:

- Headings **MUST** be in logical order and **MUST NOT** skip levels.
- Link text **MUST** be descriptive out of context and **MUST NOT** use vague phrases like "click here".
- Lists **SHOULD** use proper markdown list syntax instead of ad-hoc line prefixes.
- Images **MUST** include meaningful alt text when conveying content.
- Tables **SHOULD** include clear headers and **MUST NOT** be used for visual-only layout.
- Bare URLs **SHOULD** be converted to proper links when readability improves.
- Accessibility guidance **SHOULD** be concise and actionable rather than copying long external standards text.
